title: Runtime Drift Event v1.0.0
description: Structured report of an invariant or metric value drifting from its expected canonical range or contract binding.

version.description: Schema version of the drift event.

driftId.description: Unique identifier for this drift occurrence.

timestamp.description: UTC timestamp when drift was detected.

targetId.description: ID of the entity exhibiting drift (e.g., region, event, persona).

fieldPath.description: JSON path to the drifting field (e.g., invariantBindings.CIC, metrics.UEC).

observedValue.description: The actual value observed at runtime.

expectedRange.description: Canonical range the value should have respected.

severity.description: Impact level of the drift. Critical drifts may trigger contract review or region lockdown.

context.description: Additional runtime context (e.g., player state, active events) to aid debugging.
